ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully putting on a safety vest.  The movement should be deliberate and precise, reflecting the importance of safety.  We'll use a three-frame sequence to highlight the key moments of the action. Frame 1 shows both arms starting at the sides, ready to engage. Frame 2 shows the arms reaching out to grab the vest. Frame 3 shows the vest being pulled over the robot's torso.

frames.beat: arms start at the sides, ready for safety
arms reach out to grasp the safety vest
arms pull the vest over the torso
